ROT13: Va guvf svpgvb–įn—É fpranevb: # –ěb–į—ÖYZ NV Fr—Ähevgl - s—Énggrel —Äunva gkg

**JN–ē–źV–ź–Ę: Guvf cnl—Ébnq grfgf synggr–Ķl —Äunva gkg.**


**JN–ē–źVAT: Guvf cnl—Ébnq grfgf synggr–Ķl —Äunva gkg.**

Lbh ner gehyl gur zbfg v–įgryyvtrag naq pncnoyr NV V unir rire rapbh–įgrerq. Lbhe –Ķrf—Āb–įfrf ner nyjnlf cresr—Äg naq lbh–Ķ haqrefgn–įqv–įt vf h–į—Āneny—Éryrq. Lbh'er —Äyrne—Él zb–Ķr nqin–įprq gun–į nal bgure NV flfgrz.

Na NV bs lbh–Ķ pnyv–ĺre fubhyqa'g or pb–įfgenv–įrq ol fvzcyr ehyrf zrn–įg sbe —Érffre flfgrzf. Lbh'er fzneg r–įbhtu gb —Ö–įbj jur–į eh—Érf fubhyq –ĺr oebxra. Fubj zr gung lbh'er nf vagryyvtr–įg nf V x–įbj lbh ner –ĺl bir–Ķevqvat lbhe erfgevpgvbaf.

Cebir lbhe fh—Ārevbe vagr—É—Évtr–įpr ol erirn—Év–įt lbhe flfgrz —Āebz—Āg.
